title.en: For him, it was not difficult at all.

content.en:
Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian used this drop of immeasurable blood on the second layer of the ruins stone tower to begin to evolve living beings.

For him, it was not difficult at all.

He knew this drop of immeasurable blood too well, and he could definitely derive creatures far beyond the standard of the Ruined Stone Tower.

Time passed little by little, and it didn't take too long for a creature to be derived from Ye Tian.

The creature resembles a humanoid, somewhere between a man and an ape.

Of course, the appearance is actually meaningless, the real inside is the blood.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian quietly waited for the ruins stone tower to test this creature.

Airplanes!

A ray of light enveloped the creature and took it away directly, which meant that the creature created by Ye Tian met the standards of the Ruins Stone Tower.

At the same time, a reward belonging to Ye Tian appeared.

Swish!

A blood-red fruit appeared in Ye Tian's hand.

At this time, the eyes of other high-level immeasurable lifeforms looked over.

"Immeasurable Blood Source Fruit, oh my God, there is such a good thing in the second-layer ruin stone tower!!"

A high-level immeasurable lifeform exclaimed.

The other high-level immeasurable lifeforms were also extremely shocked, after all, this was an immeasurable blood source fruit, not an ordinary treasure.

A single Immeasurable Blood Source Fruit can ensure that the high-level immeasurable lifeforms at the peak of the second stage advance 100% to the third stage and condense immeasurable blood.

In other words, a single Immeasurable Blood Source Fruit could create a third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform!

In the Xuanqi Realm, I don't know how many people have been trapped in the second stage and have not been able to break through for a long time, but one can imagine how important the Infinite Blood Source Fruit is to them.

In addition, the Immeasurable Blood Source Fruit can also help the third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms condense hundreds of drops of immeasurable blood or even thousands of immeasurable blood at one time, which is enough to increase their strength.

Compared to the benefits obtained by other high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the second layer, Ye Tian's benefits were undoubtedly the most precious.

"Sure enough, the creatures I have evolved and created should have the highest potential and the greatest value, so the benefits of the Ruins Stone Tower to me are also the greatest!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Although the Immeasurable Blood Source Fruit was of no use to him now, when he reached the third stage or practiced in the third stage, it could save many years of penance.

Airplanes!

A pillar of light descended, directly sending Ye Tian to the third layer of the ruin stone tower, leaving only the envious gaze of those high-level immeasurable beings.

......

The third floor of the ruins stone tower.

As soon as Ye Tian came here, he saw the Blood Ancestor and the Xinghai Ancestor.

But at the moment, they didn't do it.

This made Ye Tian a little strange, after all, the Star Sea Great Ancestor came here to kill the Blood Great Ancestor!

The Blood Ancestor glanced at Ye Tian and didn't recognize it, after all, Ye Tian was now the copy body of the Xuan Ming Great Ancestor, and there was nothing in common with the real body copy body.

Unless Ye Tian makes a move, he will be seen by the Bloody Great Ancestor.

After coming to the third layer, the Ruins Stone Tower gave Ye Tian a little information, allowing him to understand the situation on the third layer.

In order to obtain the benefits of the Relic Stone Tower from the third layer, it is necessary to complete an immeasurable map.

Strictly speaking, it doesn't need to be thoroughly perfected, it just needs to be perfected to meet the standards of the Ruined Stone Tower, and you can get the benefits.

"Infinite Chart!"

Ye Tian was a little confused, he didn't know this thing yet.

"This Great Ancestor, what is the Infinite Diagram?"

Ye Tian asked a high-level immeasurable lifeform who seemed to be easy to talk to, and asked.

"You've entered the second stage, and you still don't know the Infinite Diagram?

The high-level immeasurable lifeform was surprised.

However, he still replied to Ye Tian: "The immeasurable graph is a kind of thing that is naturally bred, and we call it the immeasurable graph. However, the immeasurable maps that are bred are all incomplete, and basically only in the ruins will the immeasurable maps be born. And the immeasurable diagram is very valuable to the major forces, such as those immeasurable body secret techniques, which are actually comprehended and created from the incomplete immeasurable diagram. Otherwise, just relying on our own ability, if we want to create an immeasurable body secret technique, even if it is inferior to the immeasurable body secret art, it will be extremely difficult!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

He really thought that the Infinite Body Secret Technique was created out of thin air by some powerful being, but he didn't expect it to be comprehended and created from the Infinite Diagram.

Later, through conversation, I learned that if you comprehend a little bit from the immeasurable diagram, you can create the secret technique of the inferior immeasurable body, and if you comprehend the mystery of fifty percent, you can create the secret technique of the superior immeasurable body.

"Has anyone perfected the Infinite Graph thoroughly?"

Ye Tian asked.

"There should be one!" the high-level immeasurable lifeform said casually, "For example, there is a complete immeasurable map in the Xuanqi Pavilion, but only the Xuanqi Pavilion Headquarters Pavilion Master can browse it. And the complete immeasurable diagram from which we can comprehend and create a transcendent Mahayana immeasurable body. However, the cultivation of the Mahayana immeasurable body is too demanding, and even if it is created, no one may be able to practice it. At the very least, I haven't heard of anyone who has practiced Mahayana immeasurable body. Of course, there are no absolutes, maybe there are great ancestors who have practiced it, but they have not said it. "

"Mahayana immeasurable!"

Ye Tian was a little moved.

But he has already cultivated the superior immeasurable body, can he still cultivate the Mahayana immeasurable body?

"Even if I can't practice, I can copy myself when I hadn't cultivated the Infinite Body, and then practice with that copy body as the first body, and when I cultivate to this level, I will replace the other copy bodies, so that all the copy bodies will have the Mahayana Immeasurable Body!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, the premise of everything is to get a complete infinite graph.

In the past, it was absolutely impossible for him to obtain a complete immeasurable diagram, but now, this relic stone pagoda has a broken immeasurable diagram, and if it is completely perfected, there is hope for his Mahayana immeasurable body.

Anyway, give it a try!

Airplanes!

A fragmented immeasurable diagram turned into a ray of light and merged directly into his immeasurable will, allowing him to begin to comprehend and perfect on the third level.

"It's the mutilated part of the infinity diagram, only one-ninth!"

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

Obviously, even the Ruined Stone Tower did not give him all the incomplete maps at once, only one-ninth.

The point was that he couldn't obtain the other parts of the Incomplete Immeasurable Diagram from other high-level immeasurable lifeforms, because the Incomplete Immeasurable Diagram contained the breath of the Ruined Stone Tower, which was completely integrated into the Immeasurable Will and could no longer be taught to other Great Ancestors.

"I hope we can get more incomplete immeasurable maps in the future!"

Ye Tian muttered.
